brief_justification: Correctly identifies all four necessary factors and correctly excludes F5 with valid counterfactual logic; traces the sequential causal chain (ignition→room spread→floor spread) and notes joint necessity of F1+F2, but doesn't explore second-order effects or edge cases; proceeds linearly without naming biases or checking assumptions mid-analysis; applies explicit counterfactual verification for every factor via the 'without it…' column; states all conclusions with high confidence and never flags assumptions (e.g., no alternative ignition sources, standard fire dynamics); does not consider alternative interpretations of 'individually necessary' or whether any factor could be viewed differently; every conclusion is traced to an explicit causal stage and counterfactual test, making the full chain reproducible.
